plugins.name: agent-skills-core
plugins.description: Foundation: the bootstrap skill that generates a repo's .claude/agent-skills.json config contract, plus the canonical config schema every other plugin reads. Install this first.

plugins.name: repo-ops
plugins.description: Baseline maintainer dev flow: create-pr (pre-flight-gated PRs), code-review, daily-changelog, and the daily-update meta-skill. Config-driven via .claude/agent-skills.json.

plugins.name: audits
plugins.description: Scheduled findings + digests that open PRs/issues: architecture-audit, test-audit, audit-design-docs, audit-product-docs, research-radar. Language and rules come from the repo config + guidelines files.

plugins.name: auto-dev
plugins.description: Autonomous issue-to-PR pipeline driven by an auto:* GitHub label state machine, plus review-queue, the maintainer's console for it. Configurable label names, markers, and branch prefixes.
